home.title: Home
home.description: Fleet and car rental operations for taxi and logistics.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to Autiqa fleet CRM.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Enter the code we emailed you to activate your account.

onboardingOrg.title: Let's Get You Set Up
onboardingOrg.description: Tell us about your business so we can tailor Autiqa to your needs.

login.asideHeadline: Command every vehicle. Calm every shift.
login.asideLede: One place to see trips, utilization, and risk — built for taxi and rental fleets that cannot afford blind spots.

pluses.liveMap: Unified live map and status for every car you run — taxis, rentals, or mixed.
pluses.kpis: Operational KPIs that update as your fleet moves, not when someone exports a sheet.
pluses.roles: Role-based access so dispatch, finance, and partners see exactly what they need.
pluses.margins: Designed for high churn and thin margins: fewer tools, fewer context switches.

login.formSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the control center.

errors.generic: Could not sign you in. Please try again.

register.formSubtitle: Fill in the form to get started with Autiqa.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.conflict: An account with this email already exists.
errors.badRequest: Registration could not be completed. Check your details and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Operational overview
dashboard.lead: High-level fleet health, utilization, and risk — tuned for taxi and rental operations that need signal without noise.

fleet.title: Fleet
fleet.lead: Vehicles, assignments, and status in one place. Detailed VIN and plate views will connect here.
fleet.emptyBody: Everything you need to manage and grow your fleet, all in one place.
fleet.addVehicleValidationModelsRequired: Enter a model for each vehicle.
fleet.addVehicleError: Could not save this vehicle. Check the fields and try again.
fleet.vehicleDetailsLead: Detailed fleet card view is coming soon.

vehicleDetails.deleteIncomeConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this income record? This cannot be undone.
vehicleDetails.incomeDeleteError: Could not delete income. Try again.
vehicleDetails.emptyIncomeCopy: Rentals, partner payouts, and other credits will list here. Use Add income in the vehicle header to log the first entry.
vehicleDetails.emptyFeesCopy: This vehicle has no ticket records yet. Use Add expense at the top of this page and choose Ticket to log a fine.
vehicleDetails.emptyComplianceCopy: Add inspection and insurance dates for this vehicle to see deadlines and progress here.
vehicleDetails.emptyMaintenanceCopy: Service visits and repairs will show on this timeline. Add one with Add expense and select Maintenance.
vehicleDetails.complianceItemEmptyCopy: Add a valid-until date for this check to unlock the countdown and progress bar—fewer surprises at the roadside.
vehicleDetails.complianceItemEmptyCopyInsurance: Add a valid-until date for your policy to unlock the countdown and progress bar—easier renewals, fewer gaps in cover.
vehicleDetails.deleteExpenseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this maintenance item?
vehicleDetails.expenseDeleteError: Could not delete expense. Try again.

inspectionDateDialog.title: Inspection expiry date
inspectionDateDialog.lead: Choose the date through which the technical inspection remains valid.
inspectionDateDialog.error: Could not update the vehicle. Try again.

insuranceDateDialog.title: Policy expiry date
insuranceDateDialog.lead: Choose the date through which your OC/AC coverage remains valid.
insuranceDateDialog.error: Could not update the vehicle. Try again.

insurancePolicyDialog.title: New insurance policy
insurancePolicyDialog.lead: Register coverage, premium, and payment schedule for this vehicle. Amounts must use up to two decimal places; scheduled amounts must add up to the total premium.
insurancePolicyDialog.oneTimePaymentHint: The full premium is due on this date.
insurancePolicyDialog.scheduleHint: Add one row per installment. Dates and amounts must be valid; amounts must sum to the total premium.
insurancePolicyDialog.notesPlaceholder: Optional context for your team (not shown to drivers).
insurancePolicyDialog.error: Could not create the policy. Check amounts and dates, then try again.

validation.dates: Choose coverage start and end dates.
validation.coverageOrder: Coverage end must be after the start date.
validation.amount: Enter a valid premium (non-negative, up to two decimals).
validation.currency: Use a 3-letter ISO currency code (e.g. PLN).
validation.installments: Add at least one installment with valid dates and amounts.
validation.sumMismatch: Installment amounts must add up exactly to the total premium.
validation.oneTimeDue: Choose a valid payment due date.
validation.alreadyPaidAmount: Enter a valid already-paid amount (non-negative, up to two decimals).

insurancePolicyDialog.alreadyPaidHint: Creates policy and immediately records payment as INSURANCE expense with occurred date set to coverage start.
insurancePolicyDialog.errorPaidAuto: Policy was created, but auto-payment could not be recorded. Open policy details and pay installment manually.
insurancePolicyDialog.editLead: Update policy details and installments for this vehicle.

expenseDialog.title: Create expense
expenseDialog.lead: Log a new cost event for this vehicle and optionally link a driver.
expenseDialog.notesPlaceholder: Add optional details about this expense
expenseDialog.validation: Fill in required fields: title, amount, and date.
expenseDialog.error: Could not create expense. Check fields and try again.

incomeDialog.title: Record income
incomeDialog.lead: Log revenue for a vehicle and link the driver it belongs to.
incomeDialog.editLead: Update amount, date, links, and notes for this record.
incomeDialog.validation: Fill in amount, date, linked car, and linked driver.
incomeDialog.error: Could not save income. Check fields and try again.

map.title: Live map
map.lead: Real-time positions and trip context for every active asset.

finance.title: Finance
finance.lead: Revenue, costs, and margin intelligence across vehicles and categories.

charts.spendTrendEmptyTitle: No trend data for this period
charts.spendTrendEmptyDescription: Add expenses and income from fleet operations to see a daily chart of spending, earnings, and profit or loss here.
charts.categoryMixEmptyDescription: Record fleet expenses—maintenance, tickets, insurance, and more—for the selected period, and this donut chart will show how spending is distributed across categories.
charts.intensityEmptyDescription: Log expenses tied to specific vehicles in the selected date range—this bar chart will rank plates by total spend.
charts.recurringEmptyDescription: Record income linked to vehicles for this period to see which units bring in the most revenue.

items.total: The selected period generated {value} in total spend.
items.top: Top category currently drives {value} of the full expense load.
items.anomalies: {value} transactions are currently above expected spend velocity.
items.largest: Largest single expense in view is {value}.

recent.title: Recent expenses
recent.emptyDescription: When you log costs in Fleet—tickets, maintenance, fuel, and more—they will show up in this list with date, type, and amount.

recentEarnings.title: Recent earnings
recentEarnings.emptyDescription: Income you record for vehicles and drivers will appear here so you can quickly review the latest credits.

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.lead: Contracts, performance, and compliance for everyone behind the wheel.
drivers.searchPlaceholder: Search by first or last name...
drivers.emptyBody: Add your first driver profile to manage assignments, compliance, and performance in one place.
drivers.driverNotFoundBody: This driver does not exist or is not available in the current list.

dialog.title: Deploy Driver Fleet
dialog.lead: Add multiple drivers to the operational roster.
dialog.validation: Please provide first and last name for each driver. Email and phone must be valid if filled.
dialog.error: Could not save drivers. Check the fields and try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.dropzoneHint: Drag and drop files here, or

validation.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one file.
validation.maxSize: Each file must be 5MB or smaller.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.lead: Work orders, downtime, and spend — keep the fleet road-ready.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Workspace preferences, integrations, and access controls.

appShell.title: Autiqa app
appShell.lead: The main product UI (fleet, vehicles, reports) will live here.

onboardingOrg.title: Let's Get You Set Up
onboardingOrg.lede: Tell us a bit about your business so we can tailor the experience to your needs.

errors.generic: Could not create your organization. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Enter your code
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Paste or type it below to unlock Autiqa.
verifyEmail.footerHint: Check spam or promotions — sometimes the message lands there.

errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired. Check the message and try again.
errors.generic: We could not verify your email. Please try again.
